hook.text: John DeLorean left GM to build a futuristic sports car with gull-wing doors and a stainless steel body.

buildup.text: The car looked incredible. But its underpowered engine made it slower than a Toyota Camry.

discovery.text: Production quality was terrible. Doors didn't align. Panels leaked. The factory was in chaos.

twist.text: DeLorean was arrested in an FBI drug sting while trying to raise money to save his company.

climax.text: Only 9,000 cars were built before the company collapsed. Then 'Back to the Future' made it immortal.

punchline.text: A failed car became cinema's most famous time machine.

quiz.question: What saved the DeLorean's legacy?
options: The film 'Back to the Future' made the car iconic
